title: 25 Metres Rolls Double Sided Satin Ribbon Reels in Range of Widths & Colours (Bright Gold, 10mm x 25 Metres)
features: HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL - This range of ribbon is made from a durable fabric which is not only strong but feels great too. With a double sided satin finish, the ribbon is vibrant & bright and is smooth to feel.

RANGE OF USAGE - Our ribbon rolls are easy to cut to any required length and will be perfect for a range of uses such as gift wrapping, flower bouquets, balloon decoration, Champagne bottle, room decorations and so much more! They are ideal for any occasion such as Christmas, birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, baby showers, Mother's day, halloween, christenings, easter & so many more! The possibilities are endless.
RANGE OF WIDTHS & COLOURS - Choose from a wide range of 21 vibrant & beautiful colours. Available in a selection of widths, choose from 3mm, 6mm, 10mm, 16mm, 25mm, 38mm and 50mm
FULL ROLLS - Each item includes a full roll of ribbon. The 38mm and 50mm widths are supplied neatly wrapped around a piece of card.
